meaning: adj.涓嶈鐪熺殑,涓嶇儹蹇冪殑
examples: A halfhearted attempt at writing a novel.
Such apologies as they make are deemed halfhearted and insincere.
"Hey, Mike," I called, waving back, unable to be halfhearted on a morning like this.
More than one Strip establishment has made a halfhearted attempt to recreate a vintage diner experience.
The political platforms of the center-left parties are halfhearted and almost entirely domestic in their focus.
